prompts.scene: The Psychologist Who Joined a Cult

prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A serious-looking owl character dressed in a worn tweed jacket sits at a cluttered 1950s wooden desk, round spectacles perched on its beak. The desk is covered in stacked books, loose papers, and an old brass desk lamp casting warm golden light. The owl leans forward with a studious, focused expression, one wing resting on an open tome. Bookshelves packed with academic volumes line the dark-paneled walls behind it. The overall atmosphere is scholarly and intimate, evoking a mid-century university office. no text
